overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Last of Us Part II showing a character navigating a flooded post-apocalyptic urban street during a heavy rainstorm. The character wades through waist-deep water past abandoned vehicles and approaches a large cascading waterfall under a collapsed overpass.

events.description: emerges from dark underpass into the brighter flooded courtyard

agents.ego_description: wading through waist-deep water under a concrete overpass, moving toward an opening

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure overhead casting deep shadows
shallow water covering the ground reflecting the overcast sky
red brick building completely covered in green ivy and vegetation
white regulatory sign partially submerged in water

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, enclosed concrete underpass with low visibility. As the character moves forward, they emerge into a flooded courtyard where an ivy-covered brick building becomes visible, and the lighting transitions from dim to naturally diffused daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban street with abandoned vehicles

events.description: passes abandoned station wagon partially submerged in flood water
continues wading forward as the sound of rushing water grows louder

agents.ego_description: navigating through deeper water past moss-covered abandoned cars in the flooded street

entered.detail: green moss-covered station wagon submerged in flood water
distant white water visible between buildings indicating a large cascade
pile of broken concrete and rubble along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open flooded street lined with vegetation-covered buildings. An abandoned station wagon appears on the right, and in the distance, a waterfall cascade becomes visible between the ruined structures as the character advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: large cascade waterfall in flooded urban canyon

events.description: approaches large turbulent waterfall cascading between ruined buildings

agents.ego_description: approaching a massive waterfall, wading through increasingly turbulent water

entered.detail: churning white water where the cascade hits the flooded street
raised concrete structure in the middle of the water flow

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive waterfall cascading down between two ruined buildings. The water becomes increasingly turbulent and white as the character wades closer to the base of the falls, with mist rising from the impact zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow ledge alongside turbulent cascade under elevated highway

events.description: turns right to follow the water's edge along a concrete path
climbs up onto a concrete ledge and continues forward

agents.ego_description: navigating along the water's edge, climbing over debris, accompanied by another survivor

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead on the left side of the flooded path

entered.detail: narrow walkway along the edge of the turbulent water
rusted metal railing along the concrete path
massive concrete highway structure spanning above the flooded area

segments.scene_description: The character turns to follow a narrow concrete ledge alongside the turbulent water, passing the waterfall. A companion appears walking ahead on the left. The character climbs over debris and continues under an elevated highway overpass while the waterfall recedes to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed underpass into a sprawling, flooded urban ruin dominated by a massive waterfall. It begins in the darkness of a concrete tunnel before emerging into a flooded courtyard where an ivy-covered brick building appears as the lighting shifts to diffused daylight. As the character advances through the open street, the view expands past vegetation-covered buildings and an abandoned station wagon to reveal a distant cascade of water between the ruins. The scene then intensifies as the character wades toward the base of the massive waterfall, where the water turns turbulent and white amidst rising mist. Finally, the camera turns to follow a narrow concrete ledge alongside the rushing water, passing a companion and moving under an elevated highway overpass as the falls recede to the right.
